subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Mahdí! We have hearkened unto thy call and have answered thee through this perspicuous Tablet. Say: Praise be unto Thee, O my God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل مهدی سمعت ندائک اجبناک بهدا اللوح المبین قل لک الحمد یا الهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
